name: avalon quik check
description_short: Avalon Quik Check is a check-cashing service in South Los Angeles offering payroll, tax refund, and government benefit check cashing starting at 1% fee, plus money transfers and bill payment services.
description_long:
Avalon Quik Check operates as a neighborhood check-cashing and financial services outlet located at 525 E Vernon Ave in Los Angeles, CA, near the intersection of E Vernon Ave and Avalon Blvd. The business serves the South LA community with traditional check-cashing services and ancillary financial services that cater to unbanked and underbanked consumers. Founded to provide accessible cash access services, the company positions itself as a low-cost alternative in the South Los Angeles market.

The company offers a broad range of check-cashing services including payroll checks, income tax refunds, SSI (Supplemental Security Income) checks, unemployment benefits, 401(k) distributions, and insurance claim checks. Beyond check-cashing, Avalon Quik Check provides money transfer services via MoneyGram, sells money orders, facilitates bill payments, offers fax services, sells stamps and MTA bus passes, and serves as an AT&T payment authorized location. These bundled services position the business as a financial services hub for customers who may lack traditional bank accounts.

The company distinguishes itself primarily through pricing, advertising "the lowest price in south LA" with fees starting at 1%. This competitive fee structure appeals to price-sensitive customers in the immediate area. The business maintains extended hours (8 AM–7 PM most weekdays, 9 AM–2 PM Sunday), making services accessible beyond standard banking hours. The company explicitly states it cashes "all types of checks," indicating broad acceptance policies.

However, customer satisfaction appears problematic based on available data. The business holds a 1.0-star rating with a single 1-star review from November 2017 describing a cash-counting error and unprofessional staff behavior. The review alleges the staff member responded defensively rather than resolving the customer's missing funds complaint. No subsequent reviews are recorded, making current service quality assessment difficult. This limited feedback, combined with the single negative review, suggests either low review volume or potential reputation concerns that warrant caution.
address: 525 E Vernon Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90011

company_info.headquarters: 525 E Vernon Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90011

pros: Advertises lowest check-cashing fees in South LA starting at 1%
Cashes all major check types including payroll, tax refunds, SSI, unemployment, 401(k), and insurance checks
Extended business hours including weekend service (8 AM–7 PM weekdays, 9 AM–2 PM Sunday)
Bundled services including MoneyGram money transfers, money order sales, and bill payment
AT&T payment authorized location for bill payment convenience
Located in South LA serving underbanked community with accessible financial services
Offers ancillary services like fax, stamps, and MTA bus pass sales
cons: Single available review is 1-star with allegation of cash-counting error and unprofessional staff response
No subsequent customer reviews recorded, limiting transparency on current service quality
Alleged staff member responded defensively to customer complaint about missing funds rather than resolving issue
Limited online verification and business transparency beyond Yahoo Local listing
No information on acceptable ID requirements, hold times, or fee schedule details
best_for: South LA residents without bank accounts needing check-cashing services
Unbanked workers seeking low-cost payroll check conversion to cash
Government benefit recipients (SSI, unemployment) requiring check-to-cash services
Customers seeking bundled financial services in a single location
diagnosis: Avalon Quik Check is best suited for South LA residents without traditional bank accounts who need quick check-to-cash conversion at competitive rates. Primary caveat: the single available customer review documents a serious service failure involving cash handling and staff professionalism; prospective customers should verify current service standards before use, particularly given the absence of recent reviews or corroborating feedback.
